scripts.video:render:hero: remotion render remotion/index.ts AcaciaLaunchHero public/video/acacia-launch-hero.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --crf 22
scripts.video:render:preview: remotion render remotion/index.ts AcaciaAppPreview public/video/acacia-app-preview.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --crf 22
scripts.video:strip-audio: ffmpeg -y -i public/video/acacia-launch-hero.mp4 -an -c:v copy /tmp/acacia-launch-hero.mp4 && mv /tmp/acacia-launch-hero.mp4 public/video/acacia-launch-hero.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i public/video/acacia-app-preview.mp4 -an -c:v copy /tmp/acacia-app-preview.mp4 && mv /tmp/acacia-app-preview.mp4 public/video/acacia-app-preview.mp4
scripts.video:render: npm run video:render:hero && npm run video:render:preview && npm run video:strip-audio
